MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: At every spin, any combinations of 4 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.GoldSymbolsFeature1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) may appear with gold frames.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.GoldSymbolsFeature2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierFeature1: During any spins, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierFeature2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierFeature3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierFeature4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MajesticTreasuresPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers above the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.

MajesticTreasuresRules.GeneralRules1: Majestic Treasures is a 5 by 5 symbols combination video slot featuring Gold framed symbols and win multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

MajesticTreasuresRules.GeneralRules3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet multiplier.
MajesticTreasuresRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
